subject: Need a quote for website redesign
body: Hi, we run a small accounting firm and need a new site with booking forms and a client portal. Could you share pricing and timeline?

subject: Invoice issue on last payment
body: Hello, I think we were charged twice on invoice 2041. Please can someone check this urgently?

subject: Partnership opportunity
body: We help agencies offer automation services to their clients. Interested in exploring a partnership?
